data.author: wentasah
data.message:
Fix invalid conversion from 'const AVCodec*' to 'AVCodec*'

When compiling with libavcodec version 59.37.100 and GCC 12.3.0 I get
the following error message:

    src/ffmpeg_encoder.cpp: In member function 'bool ffmpeg_image_transport::FFMPEGEncoder::openCodec(int, int)':
    src/ffmpeg_encoder.cpp:97:51: error: invalid conversion from 'const AVCodec*' to 'AVCodec*' [-fpermissive]

The change in libavcodec that causes this was introduced in
https://github.com/FFmpeg/FFmpeg/commit/626535f6a169e2d821b969e0ea77125ba7482113,
and appeared first in version 59.0.100.

This commit fixes the error.

Co-authored-by: Jan Randa <randaja4@fel.cvut.cz>

data.author: akssri
data.message:
src/ffmpeg_decoder.cpp:
- check if hwdevice_ctx returns; else default to AV_HWDEVICE_TYPE_NONE.
- use SWS_ACCURATE_RND flag for non-aligned frames.

src/ffmpeg_encoder.cpp:
- use strided copy for non-aligned frame.
